description: A designed graphic with a booking-style portrait of a man set inside a white photo frame against a dark brick background. A handwritten-style caption reads 'FELONY SEXUAL ASSAULT X2'. Text at the lower left reads 'Worst of the Worst' with a 'Portland' tab, and an ICE seal sits at the bottom.
